name: 6' Twig Tree Christmas Artificial Tree Brown - Wondershop™
description:
Get into the Christmas spirit by decorating your home with this Twig Tree Christmas Artificial Tree from Wondershop™. Made from polyethylene, this artificial Christmas tree features a twig design with prelit branches to cast a warm, festive glow. Plus, it comes with an attached base for quick and easy display on any flat surface.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
